steps.t: Ore deposits can be found along towering rocks in Pren Gwydh just south of Rook's Hut. You should collect ore deposits for the smithing of the ring Ro…
There is a small forge at Rook's Hut in Pren Gwydh. You should return to the hut with the ore you collected and craft a sufficient ring.
Rook is at his hut in Pren Gwydh, waiting for a Ring of Power to be brought to him. You should bring Rook the ring you forged from local metal veins a…
